name: teams
description: Work with Teams using the configured Microsoft Teams app connector.

interface.longDescription: Use Teams to summarize chats, extract actions, and draft channel or meeting follow-ups through the connected Microsoft Teams app.
defaultPrompt: Summarize chat, pull out action items, or draft follow-up

skillPreviews.name: teams
skillPreviews.description: Summarize Microsoft Teams conversations, triage unread or recent activity, draft follow-ups, and manage Planner tasks through connected Teams data. Use when the user wants to review chats or channels, identify owners and next steps, prepare a safe reply or post, or turn Teams follow-ups into Microsoft Planner tasks.

skillPreviews.name: teams-channel-summarization
skillPreviews.description: Summarize activity from one Microsoft Teams channel or one scoped Teams conversation and return a concise recap or post-ready follow-up.

skillPreviews.name: teams-daily-digest
skillPreviews.description: Create a daily Microsoft Teams digest from selected chats, channels, or workstreams. Use when the user asks for a daily Teams recap or summary of today's Teams activity.

skillPreviews.name: teams-messages
skillPreviews.description: Compose, route, draft, or send Microsoft Teams messages with exact destination resolution, real user mentions, and Teams-native DM or channel routing.

skillPreviews.name: teams-notification-triage
skillPreviews.description: Triage recent Microsoft Teams activity into a priority queue or task list for the user.

skillPreviews.name: teams-planner-task-management
skillPreviews.description: Review and manage Microsoft Planner tasks from Teams workflows. Use when the user wants to inspect plans or buckets, create tasks from follow-ups, update task fields, or safely delete a Planner task.

skillPreviews.name: teams-reply-drafting
skillPreviews.description: Draft Microsoft Teams replies from available context. Use when the user wants help finding messages that likely need a response and preparing reply drafts.
